name: Mermail Abyssmander
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>水精鱗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マーメイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－アビスマンダー
desc:
You can banish this card from your Graveyard to activate 1 of these effects;
● Increase the Levels of all "Mermail" monsters you currently control by 1.
● Increase the Levels of all "Mermail" monsters you currently control by 2.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
